name: refine_blade_forge_energy_comparison
description: Focused experiment for separating RefineBlade Forge attribution from +1 next-turn energy value.

addCards.notes: Forge 9 and next-turn energy card under test.
Forge 9 and next-turn energy card under test.

assumptions: Forge realized value is credited back to RefineBlade only when SovereignBlade is played.
Both variants keep Forge fixed at 9; the EV delta isolates +1 next-turn energy in this deck and simulator policy.
SovereignBlade does not start in the deck; the first Forge play generates it into hand.
SovereignBlade direct damage remains credited to SovereignBlade, while Forge increments are credited to the source card.
Deltas are local to this deck, simulator policy, run count, and turn horizon.
